sentences.text: Thank you for calling Buckingham. Please listen carefully to the following choices as our menu options have recently changed. If you know your party's extension, you may dial it at any time. For a dial by name directory, please press one for property management. Or if you are a Buckingham Resident, please press two for commercial leasing. Or if you are a commercial tenant, please press three. For construction or construction accounting, please press four. For accounts payable, please press five for H. R. Or employment verification, please press six. Thank you for calling Buckingham.
